---
title: '`syncweaver init orch`'
---

Initialize an orchestrator repository with the packaged syncweaver orchestrator
templates (dashboard, index page, and workflow files).

## Usage

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from ccbr_tools.shell import shell_run

help_text = shell_run("syncweaver init orch --help")
print("```")
print(help_text)
print("```")
```

## Examples

```sh
# Initialize orchestrator content in the current directory
syncweaver init orch
```
